entities.name: Idea Compounding
entities.context: Framework for iterative idea development with user-controlled exploration rounds and on-demand synthesis

entities.name: Exploration Phase
entities.context: Initial phase allowing unlimited iteration rounds with no forced synthesis

entities.name: Synthesis Phase
entities.context: Second phase triggered only by explicit user request (generate report, synthesize now)

entities.name: Narrative Report
entities.context: Structured output format including initial concept, exploration summary, contradictions, and logical weaknesses

entities.name: Contradictions
entities.context: Element tracked during exploration - identified and resolved in final report

entities.name: Logical Weaknesses
entities.context: Issues identified during exploration and strengthened in synthesis

relationships.context: First phase of the Idea Compounding framework
Second phase triggered by explicit user request
Synthesis phase produces the narrative report output
Report structure includes section for contradictions identified and resolved
Report structure includes section for weaknesses and strengthening
